app.title: InfraTrack
app.tagline: Open-source fleet intelligence for heavy machinery.

common.demoSearch: Search will be wired to the backend in a later iteration.

profile.pageIntro: Your InfraTrack identity, operator record and session.
profile.sessionHint: Signing out clears your session and picks another preview user for this device.
profile.apiSetupTitle: Why you don’t see real MockAPI data yet
profile.apiSetupLine1: The app calls GET on your `identity` base (see `mock-api-bases.ts`). Right now that project returns HTTP 404 for the `users` and/or `operators` collections, so the UI fills in demo rows for the preview user id.
profile.apiSetupLine2: In mockapi.io create both resources with the fields you defined (id, username, email, role, …) and at least one user whose id matches the preview id in localStorage (`infratrack_preview_user_id`), or point `identity` to another project URL where those routes already work. Then reload.
profile.operatorDemoNote: User came from MockAPI, but no operator row matched this userId; showing a local placeholder until `operators` includes a matching record.
profile.offlineDemo: Preview: MockAPI did not return this user; showing local demo data for the same ID.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your credentials to access the InfraTrack console.
login.usernameHint: Any non-empty value is accepted in this demo.

controlPanel.title: Control Panel
controlPanel.intro: Centralized view of fleet health and critical fuel alerts.

load.error: Could not load dashboard data. Check your connection and try again.
load.empty: No data returned from the APIs (alerts / machinery).

map.title: GPS tracking overview
map.hint: Pan and zoom the map. Click a marker for unit details. Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors.
map.dataNote: Marker positions are derived from the fleet registry for this demo (API does not include GPS coordinates).
map.dataNoteTelemetry: Positions use the latest telemetry (latitude / longitude) per unit when available; otherwise a stable fallback around Lima.

markers.warningBody: Warning · Engine temp. elevated · Site D

maintenance.title: Recent maintenance
maintenance.empty: No maintenance records from the API.

assetManagement.title: Asset Management
assetManagement.intro: Register machinery, attach evidence, link IoT nodes and technical specs.
assetManagement.loadError: Could not load machinery from MockAPI. Check that the `machinery` resource exists on the asset-management project (see mock-api-bases.ts).
assetManagement.emptyFleet: No machines yet. Add one with the button above, or create records in MockAPI.

addDialog.title: New machinery
addDialog.error: Could not create machinery. Check MockAPI fields and your network.

telemetry.title: Telemetry & Tracking
telemetry.intro: Live GPS, fuel variation and engine hours with historical comparison.

chart.title: Real-time telemetry
chart.hint: Hover points for exact values. Click legend items to show or hide each series.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.intro: Compare fleet utilization, alert mix and efficiency trends. Filters apply to the demo dataset only.

export.demoPdf: PDF export will connect to the reporting API later.
export.demoExcel: Excel export will connect to the reporting API later.

performance.title: Optimization & Performance
performance.intro: KPIs derived from MockAPI (alerts, telemetry, machinery, operators), plus recent performance alerts and the operator roster.

metrics.operatorCoverageHint: Share of operators marked active in /operators.
metrics.fuelDeltaHint: Average telemetry fuel % minus a 75% reference baseline.

performance.loadError: Could not reach one or more performance APIs. Check mock bases and network.
performance.loadEmpty: All performance endpoints returned empty lists. Seed MockAPI or verify URLs.
performance.emptyAlerts: No idle / fuel / maintenance / geofence alerts to show.
performance.emptyOperators: No operators returned from the API.

editOperator.title: Edit operator
editOperator.error: Could not save. Check MockAPI and fields.

deleteOperator.title: Delete operator
deleteOperator.body: Remove {{name}} from MockAPI? This cannot be undone.
deleteOperator.error: Could not delete. Check if the operator is still linked to machinery.

configuration.title: Configuration & Support
configuration.intro: Local preferences, a live snapshot from MockAPI (fleet, IoT, maintenance, subscriptions), and documentation links.
configuration.accountTeaser: Open your profile to see role, contact data, operator link and sign out.

api.empty: All configuration-related endpoints returned empty data. Seed machinery, iotNodes, maintenanceRecords or subscriptions in MockAPI.

addIot.title: Register IoT node
addIot.machineryHint: Links the node to a machine from MockAPI.
addIot.lastSeenHint: Example: full ISO timestamp from the device.
addIot.noMachinery: No machinery returned from the API. Create at least one machine under Asset management first.
addIot.error: Could not create the IoT node. Check MockAPI and try again.

addMaint.title: Register maintenance
addMaint.nextHint: Used for “next service ≤ 30 days” in the summary.
addMaint.noMachinery: No machinery returned from the API. Create at least one machine under Asset management first.
addMaint.error: Could not create the maintenance record. Check MockAPI and try again.
